hook-opening.description: Opens with curiosity/emotional hook in first 3 sentences

input-01.note: Opens with relatable personal anecdote about gym membership — creates immediate recognition and emotional hook

input-02.note: Opens with 'Pull up a world map' direct engagement, then reveals Greenland vs Africa distortion — striking factual hook

input-03.note: Opens with 'Right now, there is something you're supposed to be doing that you're not doing' — directly addresses listener, creates guilty recognition

input-04.note: Opens with the paradox that Finnish people say they're not that happy despite ranking #1 — curiosity-driven hook

input-05.note: Opens with the two-trillion-dollar industry figure, then pivots to 'what does wellness actually mean?' — curiosity hook
